title: Merced City School District ransomware incident

extortion.description: OUR MISSION All scholars are ensured equitable access to high quality instruction in environments that value and build from their unique talents. Guiding scholars toward mastery of academics, we build from our scholars talents to nurture their continuous academic achievement, critical-thinking skills, and develop the resiliency, perseverance and confidence necessary to excel in learning and life. Our District team provides positive, inclusive environments where all scholars feel safe, respected, and connected.
